---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest a clarification, wording fix, link fix, or structure improvement.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the documentation change needed.

## Affected file

Link or name the affected README, doc, template, checklist, example, or agent prompt.

## Current problem

Describe what is unclear, outdated, duplicated, missing, or inconsistent.

## Suggested wording or structure

Provide a concrete suggestion if possible.

## Reader impact

Describe which reader is affected:

- Beginner
- Independent developer
- Codex user
- iOS developer
- Backend developer
- Release manager
- Maintainer

## Safety or privacy considerations

State whether the proposed documentation change touches side-effect operations, human confirmation, rollback guidance, privacy, secrets, legal review, or release procedures.
